summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Indian legal system data refresh. 12/13 backend tests passed (1 failure: analysis start returns 502 - LLM timeout on test run, not a code bug). All Indian data verified: 6 judges, 15 laws. Frontend fully working with Indian context.

minor.issue: Returns 502 during automated test (LLM call timeout ~100s). Manual usage works fine. Not a code bug.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Indian data verified: 6 judges (Chandrachud bias:15, Mishra:81, Khanna:32, Patel:22, Hemant Gupta:74, Dhulia:25), 15 Indian laws (IPC/CrPC/Constitution/NDPS/POCSO/UAPA). Landing page shows Indian stats (4.7Cr cases, 76% undertrial). Judge profiles page: all 6 judges with correct bias scores, HIGH RISK filter works (shows Mishra+Hemant Gupta only), Chandrachud modal shows bias 15 with conviction-by-caste chart. Case submission form: Caste/Community field, Indian courts in jurisdiction, presiding judge placeholder shows Justice D.Y. Chandrachud, IPC/NDPS/POCSO case types. Council roster on landing page shows editorial table format with Prosecution/Defense/Scholar/Bias members.
